## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run test:public-hygiene`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run build`

## Public Surface

- [ ] README/docs/examples updated when public behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots are real product captures when UI evidence is included
- [ ] No credentials, private hostnames, internal launch plans, or generated test artifacts committed
